details_empty: Select an item to inspect metadata, sharing, and quick actions.
properties_ownership_desc: Changing owner or group can affect access. Recursive changes apply to every child item.
recursive_owner_warning: Recursive owner/group changes can affect many files and require confirmation.
confirm_recursive_owner_text: This will set owner "{owner}" and group "{group}" for {target} and every child item.
confirm_recursive_perms_text: This will set mode {mode} for {target} and every child item.
name: Name
empty_dir_desc: This folder is empty. Start by adding new content.
trash_empty_desc: Items moved to the trash will be deleted permanently after 30 days.
no_results_desc: Try adjusting your search terms to find what you are looking for.
webdav_help: Use this URL to mount your file manager as a network drive in your OS.
webdav_windows_hint: File Explorer: This PC → Map network drive → paste the URL.
webdav_macos_hint: Finder: Go → Connect to Server → paste the URL.
webdav_linux_hint: Use your file manager's Connect to Server option or mount with davfs2.
webdav_credentials_note: Sign in with your eXtplorer username "{username}" and password.
webdav_https_note: Use HTTPS in production. Some operating systems reject WebDAV over plain HTTP.
webdav_policy_note: Access follows the administrator's WebDAV setting and your file permissions.
confirm_text: You won't be able to revert this!
scan_qr_hint: Use your authenticator app to scan the QR code, then enter the 6-digit code.
no_versions: No previous versions found for this file.
history_desc: Restoring a version will overwrite the current file.
restore_text: The current file content will be replaced.
